title: Callan JMB Receives Nasdaq Deficiency Notice on Equity
summary: Callan JMB, Inc. (CJMB) received a deficiency notice from Nasdaq for failing to maintain the required $2.5 million in stockholders' equity. The company has until May 22, 2026, to submit a remediation plan, with the possibility of an additional 180 days to regain compliance if the plan is accepted. This notice highlights the company's financial pressures and the risk of delisting, which could impact liquidity and valuation.

title: Is GE (GE) Turning Governance Scrutiny Into a Strategic Advantage for Its Aerospace Story?
summary: A recent governance dispute concerning GE Aerospace's defense business and sales to the Israel Defense Forces has sparked debate among shareholders. While this adds "governance noise," the article suggests GE's strong financial performance, including recent earnings beats and raised guidance, remains the primary driver of its investment narrative. Investors are advised to consider the company's concentrated exposure to commercial aviation and ongoing supply chain pressures, despite its robust cash generation and buyback program.

title: BiomX Stockholders Approve 2026 Equity Incentive Plan
summary: BiomX (PHGE) stockholders approved all proposals at a special meeting held on April 10, 2026, including the 2026 Equity Incentive Plan, which authorizes up to 1,390,000 new shares. This plan aims to enhance the company's ability to attract and retain talent through stock-based compensation, though it could lead to equity dilution for existing shareholders. The strong affirmative vote indicates solid stockholder support for BiomX's governance and incentive approach despite concerns flagged by Spark, TipRanks' AI Analyst, about the company's financial performance and bearish technicals.

title: Howmet Aerospace Expands Supply Chain Role With US$1.8b CAM Acquisition
summary: Howmet Aerospace (NYSE:HWM) has acquired Consolidated Aerospace Manufacturing (CAM) for US$1.8 billion in cash to expand its role in the aerospace supply chain. This acquisition deepens Howmet's component portfolio, particularly fasteners, and aims to strengthen relationships with major OEMs like Boeing and Airbus. While the deal is expected to increase content per aircraft and support growth, investors should consider integration risks and the concentration of capital in aerospace.

title: Air Lease (AL) director exits as shares cashed out at $65 in merger
summary: Air Lease Corporation (AL) director Cheryl Gordon Krongard disposed of her Class A Common Stock, including vested and unvested RSUs, as part of a cash merger with Sumisho Air Lease Corporation DAC. A total of 59,208.56 shares were converted at a price of $65.00 per share, resulting in her holding zero shares after the transaction. The merger terms dictated that all outstanding Class A common stock was cancelled and converted into the right to receive $65.00 in cash per share.

title: Bouvel Investment Partners LLC Purchases Shares of 26,892 The Boeing Company $BA
summary: Bouvel Investment Partners LLC has acquired a new stake in The Boeing Company (NYSE:BA), purchasing 26,892 shares valued at approximately $5.84 million, making it their 22nd largest position. This comes as Boeing reported a significant EPS beat of $9.92 against a -$0.40 consensus, with revenues surpassing estimates, though sell-side analysts still project a negative EPS for the fiscal year. Despite recent insider selling, institutional investors like Vanguard and Newport Trust Company have increased their holdings, collectively owning 64.82% of the company's stock.

title: Cantor Fitzgerald Investment Advisors L.P. Sells 3,124 Shares of Lockheed Martin Corporation $LMT
summary: Cantor Fitzgerald Investment Advisors L.P. reduced its stake in Lockheed Martin Corporation by 11.5% in the fourth quarter, selling 3,124 shares and holding 24,091 shares valued at approximately $11.65 million. This occurred despite Lockheed Martin exceeding revenue expectations with $20.32 billion and securing a significant $4.7 billion PAC-3 MSE production contract. Analysts currently hold a "Hold" consensus rating for Lockheed Martin, with a consensus target price of $645.79.

title: Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA Has $2.01 Billion Stake in Howmet Aerospace Inc. $HWM
summary: Massachusetts Financial Services Co. MA reduced its stake in Howmet Aerospace Inc. (NYSE:HWM) by 15.5% in the fourth quarter, though its remaining holding is valued at over $2 billion. Other institutional investors have increased their positions in the company. Analysts generally rate Howmet Aerospace as a "Moderate Buy" with a consensus price target of $260.30, despite some recent insider selling.
